case_title: MICHAEL H. SALSTEIN VS. JEANNE SCHLOTZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED FEB-24-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLOTZ, JEANNE
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-15-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL H. SALSTEIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEANIE SCHOLTZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1482 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. A CHECK IS TENDERED IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APRIL 15-2022 HEARING IF THE CHECK DOESN'T CLEAR THE BANK. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,892.50 FILED BY SALSTEIN, MICHAEL H. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHLOTZ, JEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
